member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.SearchCustomerOrder(VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.Search.CustomerOrderSearchCriteria)
member.summary: Search customer orders by given criteria

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.GetByNumber(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Find customer order by number
member.remarks: Return a single customer order with all nested documents or null if order was not found

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.GetById(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Find customer order by id
member.remarks: Return a single customer order with all nested documents or null if order was not found

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.GetByOuterId(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Find customer order by outer id
member.remarks: Return a single customer order with all nested documents or null if order was not found

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.CalculateTotals(VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder)
member.summary: Calculate order totals after changes

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.ProcessOrderPaymentsWithoutBankCardInfo(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register customer order payment in external payment system (without bankCardInfo). It's a workaround method, allowing to accept requests without bankCardInfo.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.ProcessOrderPayments(System.String,System.String,VirtoCommerce.PaymentModule.Core.Model.BankCardInfo,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register customer order payment in external payment system
member.remarks: Used in storefront checkout or manual order payment registration

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.CreateOrderFromCart(System.String)
member.summary: Create new customer order based on shopping cart.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.CreateOrder(VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder)
member.summary: Add new customer order to system

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.UpdateOrder(VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder)
member.summary: Update a existing customer order

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.GetNewShipment(System.String)
member.summary: Get new shipment for specified customer order
member.remarks: Return new shipment document with populates all required properties.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.GetNewPayment(System.String)
member.summary: Get new payment for specified customer order
member.remarks: Return new payment document with populates all required properties.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.DeleteOrdersByIds(System.String[])
member.summary: Delete a whole customer orders

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.GetDashboardStatisticsSettingsAsync
member.summary: Get dashboard statistics settings

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.GetDashboardStatisticsAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Get a some order statistic information for Commerce manager dashboard

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Web.Controllers.Api.OrderModuleController.PostProcessPayment(VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.PaymentCallbackParameters)
member.summary: Payment callback operation used by external payment services to inform post process payment in our system

member.summary: Payment callback operation used by external payment services to inform post process payment in our system

member.summary: Payment callback operation used by external payment services to inform post process payment in our system

member.summary: Partial update for the specified Orde by id
member.param: JsonPatchDocument object with fields to update

member.summary: Search order payments by given criteria

member.summary: Find order payment by id

member.summary: Get order payment by outer id
